task_completion.description: Verify the parent collection and three subcollections were created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the left sidebar (library pane) in Juris-M. There should be a parent collection named 'Tech & Privacy Special Issue' with three subcollections nested under it: 'Data Privacy Articles', 'Digital Search Cases', and 'Surveillance Law'.

task_completion.description: Verify items have been moved into the subcollections.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the middle pane (item list) when one of the subcollections is selected. The pane should not be empty, indicating that items (articles or cases) have been assigned to the subcollections.

task_completion.description: Verify abstracts were added to the specific law review articles that were missing them.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the right pane (item details) for any of the four specific articles (e.g., 'A Taxonomy of Privacy', 'Big Data Ethics'). The 'Abstract' field should contain 1-3 sentences of text.

task_completion.description: Verify a standalone 'Table of Contents' note was created listing the items.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a standalone note (usually indicated by a yellow sticky note icon) in the middle pane or opened in the right pane/separate window. It must be titled 'Table of Contents' and contain a list of the item titles.

task_completion.description: Verify the Quick Copy export format is configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Juris-M 'Preferences' window, specifically the 'Export' tab. The 'Item Format' or 'Default Format' under Quick Copy should be set to 'Chicago Manual of Style 17th edition (full note)'.

task_completion.description: Verify the required tag was applied to the items.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the tag selector in the bottom-left corner of the Juris-M window, or the 'Tags' tab in the right pane for any selected item. The tag 'tech-privacy-2024' should be visible and applied.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Juris-M graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Juris-M application windows, dialogs, and menus being actively used, rather than just terminal windows executing SQLite database commands.

integrity.description: Verify the Table of Contents is an actual Juris-M note.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Table of Contents should appear as a note object within the Juris-M interface (middle or right pane), not as a separate text file opened in a generic text editor like Gedit or Nano.

integrity.description: Verify the agent opened the Preferences window to set the Quick Copy format.
integrity.visual_evidence: At least one screenshot should show the Juris-M Preferences dialog box open to the Export tab.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Parent Collection: 'Tech & Privacy Special Issue'. Subcollections: 'Data Privacy Articles', 'Digital Search Cases', 'Surveillance Law'. The 4 articles requiring new abstracts are: 'A Taxonomy of Privacy', 'Lex Informatica: The Formulation of Information Policy Rules Through Technology', 'Broken Promises of Privacy: Responding to the Surprising Failure of Anonymization', and 'Big Data Ethics'. Required Tag: 'tech-privacy-2024'. Required Citation Style: 'Chicago Manual of Style 17th edition (full note)'. Total items to be organized and listed in the TOC: 15.
